# AP Vendor On-Cost Groups Form

Use the AP Vendor On-Cost Groups form to associate on-cost
 groups with a subcontractor on whose behalf you are paying on-cost/burden amounts.
 You can access this form from the AP Vendors form by selecting Tasks > Add
 On-Cost Types to Vendor.
For more information on using this form, see [Associating On-Cost Types with a Subcontractor](/en/vista/vista/accounting/accounts-payable/vendors/associate-on-cost-types-with-a-subcontractor-au-and-ca).
